misc: Bags Miura irons and is rumoured to sleep with them.
biography: Miso, representing Hirsala Golf, has been a consistent and dedicated presence within the Hector Trophée over the years. With ten prior participations in this esteemed pair competition, he has become a familiar figure on the greens. While his presence will be missed in the forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his legacy within the tournament remains firmly established.

Across his ten entries, Miso achieved significant success in the team format, triumphantly hoisting the coveted Hector Trophée on one memorable occasion. This victory stands as a testament to his ability to forge effective partnerships and perform under pressure. However, the prestigious Victor Trophy, recognizing individual supremacy, has yet to be added to his list of accolades.

Miso's commitment to the finer details of golf is exemplified by his unwavering loyalty to Miura irons, a choice that has even led to good-natured rumors suggesting he might, on occasion, literally sleep with them. This anecdote, while perhaps apocryphal, underscores a profound reverence for precision craftsmanship and an intense dedication to his equipment, elements that are undoubtedly reflective of his broader approach to the game.

Despite his absence from the 2026 field, Miso maintains an active and valued connection to the wider Hector events community. His past triumph and singular focus on equipment mark him as a distinctive competitor whose journey is followed with continued interest by aficionados of the sport.
